mlb.description: Placed LF Jonatan Clase on the 10-day IL retroactive to July 21. Optioned RHP Lazaro Estrada to Buffalo (IL). Recalled RHP CJ Van Eyk from Buffalo. Recalled LF Yohendrick Pinango from Buffalo (IL).
Agreed to terms with C Carlos Perez on a minor-league contract.
Sent LHP DL Hall on a rehab assignment to Nashville (IL).
Recalled LHP Alec Gamboa from Worcester (IL).

Agreed to terms with Cs Cashel Dugger and Francisco Rivero, IF Avery Ortiz, 2B Chris Hacopian, 3B Daniel Cuvet, SS Luke Williams, OFs Jack Brooks, Nick Williams and Chase Brunson, LHP Matthew Dallas and RHPs Anson Seibert, Weston Moss, Cody Howard, Zack Konstantinovsky, Max Hansmann, Gage Peterson, Cooper Allen and Cooper Harris on contracts.
Recalled RHP Hunter Dobbins from Memphis (IL). Designated RHP Scott Blewett for assignment.
Recalled RHP Noah Murdock from Indianapolis (IL). Agreed to terms with 2B Chris Rembert on a contract.
Sent RHP Edwin Díaz on a rehab assignment to Oklahoma City (PCL).
Reinstated LHP Martín Pérez from the IL. Optioned RHP JR Ritchie to Gwinnett (IL).
Recalled CF Spencer Jones from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre (IL). Reinstated LHP Max Fried from the 15-day IL. Optioned RHP Kervin Castro to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre (IL).

Sent RHP Garrett Acton on a rehab assignment to St. Paul (IL). Agreed to terms with RHPs Jackson Sleeper, Brian Strange, Ryne Palmer and Tyler Bryan on minor league contracts. Agreed to terms with RHPs Michael Barnett, Alec Bouchard, Connor Mattison, Colter McAnelly, Kole Klecker, Tommy LaPour, Steele Murdock, Ethan Lay, Max Bayles, Thomas Burns, JT Raab, Ethan Wachsmann and Brett Renfrow, OF Aidan Teel, 2B Colby Turner, SSs Isaiah Lane, Charlie Scholvin and PJ Moutzouridis and Cs Hideki Prather, Vahn Lackey and Carson Tinney on contracts.
Acquired RHP Max Martin from Kansas City Royals for RHP Nate Pearson.

Acquired RHP Nate Pearson from Houston in exchange for RHP Max Martin. Selected the contract of SS Andrew Velazquez from Omaha (IL). Placed SS Bobby Witt Jr. on the 10-day IL, retroactive to July 21. Transferred RHP Stephen Kolek from the 15-day IL to the 60-day IL. Designated CF Kameron Misner for assignment. Agreed to terms with 2B Alejo Lopez on a minor-league contract.
Reinstated 3B José Ramírez from the IL. Optioned RF Kahlil Watson to Columbus (IL).
Recalled RF Johnathan Rodríguez from Norfolk (IL). Placed C Samuel Basallo on the 10-day IL, retroactive to July 20. Recalled LHP Josh Walker from Norfolk (IL).
Recalled RHP Mason Barnett from Las Vegas (PCL). Placed RHP J.T. Ginn on the 15-day IL, retroactive to July 18.
Sent SS Javier Baez on a rehab assignment to Lakeland (FSL). Sent RHP Burch Smith on a rehab assignment to Toledo (IL). Recalled RHP Ty Madden from Toledo.
Recalled RHP Tristan Beck from Sacramento (PCL). Placed RHP Trevor McDonald on the 15-day IL.
Recalled OF Bryan De La Cruz from Lehigh Valley (IL). Placed C Garrett Stubbs on the 10-day IL, retroactive to July 18.
Sent 3B David Hamilton on a rehab assignment to Nashville (IL).
Selected the contract of LHP Charlie Barnes from Oklahoma City (PCL). Optioned RHP Landon Knack to Oklahoma City (PCL). Transferred C Will Smith from the 10-day IL to the 60-day IL.
Agreed to terms with LF Greg Jones on a minor league contract.
Recalled LHP Kohl Drake and RHP Gerardo Carrillo from Reno (PCL). Optioned RHP Juan Burgos to Reno (PCL). Placed RHP Drey Jameson on the 15-day IL retroactive to July 20.
Agreed to terms with OF Cade Marlowe on a minor league contract.
Recalled 3B Max Muncy and RHP Hayden Juenger from Las Vegas (PCL). Placed 3B Joshua Kuroda-Grauer on the 10-day IL. Placed RHP Mark Leiter Jr. on the 15-day IL, retroactive to July 19.
